feature: Fix dark mode in onboarding.tsx — replace all hardcoded colors with semantic Tailwind classes

prompts.description: Replace hardcoded colors in the onboardingUi constant
prompts.prompt:
In components/onboarding.tsx, find the `onboardingUi` constant (around line 247) and replace ALL hardcoded color values with semantic Tailwind classes. Apply these exact replacements:

1. mainCard: replace `border-[#d8ccb9] dark:border-border` → `border-border` and `bg-[#fffaf4] dark:bg-card` → `bg-card`
2. stepChip: replace `bg-[#f1dfd1] dark:bg-secondary` → `bg-secondary` and `text-[#7a5b41] dark:text-muted-foreground` → `text-muted-foreground`
3. sectionSurface: replace `border-[#e5d7c7] dark:border-border` → `border-border` and `bg-[#f8f2ea] dark:bg-secondary/60` → `bg-secondary/60`
4. sectionAccentDot: replace `bg-[#b77749]` → `bg-muted-foreground`
5. sectionHeading: replace `text-[#5e665f] dark:text-muted-foreground` → `text-muted-foreground`
6. sectionDescription: replace `text-[#7a8079] dark:text-muted-foreground` → `text-muted-foreground`
7. segmentedGroup: replace `border-[#e1d5c5] dark:border-border` → `border-border` and `bg-[#efe6d8] dark:bg-secondary` → `bg-secondary`
8. inputNote: replace `text-[#7a8079] dark:text-muted-foreground` → `text-muted-foreground`
9. inputValidation: replace `text-[#8b5a47] dark:text-destructive/90` → `text-destructive/90`
10. secondaryActionRow: replace `border-[#d8ccb9] dark:border-border` → `border-border`, `bg-[#fff7ee] dark:bg-secondary/60` → `bg-secondary/60`, `text-[#5e665f] dark:text-muted-foreground` → `text-muted-foreground`, `hover:bg-[#f8efe4] dark:hover:bg-secondary` → `hover:bg-secondary`
11. primaryCtaBase: replace `text-[#fffaf4] dark:text-primary-foreground` → `text-primary-foreground` and `focus-visible:ring-[#8a6e4b]/20` → `focus-visible:ring-primary/20`
12. progressTrack: replace `border-[#e2d6c5] dark:border-border` → `border-border` and `bg-[#f7f1e8] dark:bg-secondary/60` → `bg-secondary/60`
13. boundedInputBase: replace `border-[#C8BDB0] dark:border-border` → `border-border`, `bg-white dark:bg-card` → `bg-card`, `text-[#1A1A1A] dark:text-foreground` → `text-foreground`, `placeholder:text-[#8C8279] dark:placeholder:text-muted-foreground` → `placeholder:text-muted-foreground`, `focus-visible:border-[#4A7C59] dark:focus-visible:border-primary` → `focus-visible:border-primary`, `focus-visible:ring-[#4A7C59]/20 dark:focus-visible:ring-primary/20` → `focus-visible:ring-primary/20`

Do not change anything else. Follow CLAUDE.md guidelines.

- `border-[#5f7654] dark:border-primary` → `border-primary`

- `bg-[#5f7654] dark:bg-primary` → `bg-primary`
- `bg-[#dccfbe] dark:bg-secondary` → `bg-secondary`

Do not change anything else. Follow CLAUDE.md guidelines.

prompts.description: Replace hardcoded colors in the root wrapper and all CardTitle/CardDescription elements
prompts.prompt:
In components/onboarding.tsx, find the root return div (around line 1107) and replace `bg-[#f5f1ea] dark:bg-background` → `bg-background`. The full expression is a ternary — the inline fallback `bg-background` is already correct; only remove the `bg-[#f5f1ea] dark:` part so the ternary reads: `step === 'body' || ... ? 'bg-background' : 'bg-background'`. Since both branches are now identical, simplify to just `bg-background` with no ternary for that class.

Then find every CardTitle element with `text-[#28312b] dark:text-foreground` and replace with `text-foreground`. There are approximately 8 occurrences.

Find every CardDescription element with `text-[#5e665f] dark:text-muted-foreground` and replace with `text-muted-foreground`. There are approximately 8 occurrences.

Find every inline border-t divider with `border-[#eadfce] dark:border-border` and replace with `border-border`. There are approximately 10 occurrences.

Do not change anything else. Follow CLAUDE.md guidelines.

prompts.description: Replace hardcoded colors in primary CTA button state classes and remaining inline elements
prompts.prompt:
In components/onboarding.tsx, find every OnboardingPrimaryCta usage where the className includes inline ternary CTA state classes, and apply these replacements:

Active/enabled CTA state:
- `border-[#536847] bg-[#5f7654] shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.12),0_18px_30px_-18px_rgba(40,70,47,0.72)] hover:bg-[#516647] hover:shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.12),0_20px_32px_-18px_rgba(40,70,47,0.76)]` → `border-primary bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90`
- `border-[#536847] bg-[#5f7654] shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.14),0_20px_34px_-20px_rgba(40,70,47,0.74)] hover:border-[#4d6243] hover:bg-[#516647] hover:shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.14),0_22px_36px_-20px_rgba(40,70,47,0.78)]` → `border-primary bg-primary hover:border-primary/80 hover:bg-primary/90`

Loading/advancing state (body step):
- `border-[#526747] bg-[#58704e] shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.08),0_18px_28px_-20px_rgba(40,70,47,0.62)]` → `border-primary/80 bg-primary/80`

Disabled CTA state:
- `border-[#c1c9ba] bg-[#c8d0c2] text-[#f4f0e8] shadow-none` → `border-muted bg-muted text-muted-foreground shadow-none`
- `border-[#ccd2c5] bg-[#d9ded4] text-[#808876] shadow-none` → `border-muted bg-muted text-muted-foreground shadow-none`

Spinner color (around line 1245):
- `text-[#fffaf4]` → `text-primary-foreground`

Sticky bottom bar (around line 2293):

Search results box (around line 2152):

- `hover:bg-[#f7efe5] dark:hover:bg-secondary` → `hover:bg-secondary`

Ingredient selected 'Added' label (around line 2237):
